title: Workhorse Gateway Fleets 100-Truck Order Announcement
text: Workhorse announced a significant 100-truck order from Gateway Fleets to support lower-cost electric fleet operations in California. Gateway Fleets specializes in providing bundled electric vehicle and charging solutions for commercial delivery operators. The 100 W56 fully-electric step vans order represents substantial market validation for Workhorse's commercial EV products. This order demonstrates growing customer adoption and regional expansion in California through strategic partnerships with dealers like Kingsburg Truck Center. The deal supports Workhorse's strategy to transition from individual sales to fleet-scale operations.
